title: Industrial Renaissance
body:
# Description
Industrial Renaissance is a carefully curated Minecraft modpack centered around the golden era of technical and industrial mods. Step into a world where mechanical innovation and automation drive your progression. Built for the classic 1.12.2 version, this pack blends industrial complexity with immersive world-building and exploration.

Whether you’re a veteran of the tech mod era or a newcomer looking to explore the roots of Minecraft automation, Industrial Renaissance offers a challenging and rewarding sandbox to unleash your inner inventor.
## Key Mods
- **Tech & Power**: Industrial Foregoing, BuildCraft, NuclearCraft, Thermal Series
- **Automation & Logistics**: Integrated Dynamics Suite
- **Environment & Exploration**: Biomes O’ Plenty, Xaero's Minimap & World Map
- **Utilities & Enhancements**: AppleSkin, Controlling, Fast Leaf Decay, Reap, Nature’s Compass, JEI
## Optimized for Performance
With performance-focused mods like Phosphor, Entity Culling, and MixinBooter, Industrial Renaissance ensures smooth gameplay even in the most complex automated bases.
